metadata.name: Kubernetes Namespace
metadata.description: Creates a Kubernetes Namespace with optional single label and annotation entries for basic environment scoping.

items.name: namespace_name
items.title: Namespace name
items.description: Name to use for the namespace.

items.name: labels_enabled
items.title: Label
items.description: Add a label entry to the namespace

items.name: label_key
items.title: Label key
items.description: Value used for the labels settings.

items.name: label_value
items.title: Label value
items.description: Value used for the labels settings.

items.name: annotations_enabled
items.title: Annotation
items.description: Add an annotation entry to the namespace

items.name: annotation_key
items.title: Annotation key
items.description: Value used for the annotations settings.

items.name: annotation_value
items.title: Annotation value
items.description: Value used for the annotations settings.
